nasb.text: Then her husband arose and went after her to speak tenderly to her in order to bring her back, taking with him his servant and a pair of donkeys. So she brought him into her father’s house, and when the girl’s father saw him, he was glad to meet him.

esv.text: Then her husband arose and went after her, to speak kindly to her and bring her back. He had with him his servant and a couple of donkeys. And she brought him into her father’s house. And when the girl’s father saw him, he came with joy to meet him.

cnv.text: 她的丈夫起來，帶著一個僕人和兩頭驢去追她，用話打動她的心，叫她回來。她把丈夫帶到自己父家，那少女的父親見了那人，就歡歡喜喜迎接他。

ccb.text: 后来，她丈夫带着一个仆人和两头驴去见她，用好话劝她回去。那女子带他去见自己的父亲。她父亲看见女婿来了，便热情地接待他，
